title: Process Engineer Vacancy at NTPC Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at NTPC Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, NTPC Capital India in Thane is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About NTPC Capital India:
NTPC Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NTPC Capital India!
